key_drivers: Hawkish Fed Surprise (March 18 FOMC): Dot plot shows only 1 cut in 2026, rates held at 3.50-3.75% — headwind for equities and gold
Iran War Supply Shock: WTI crude at ~$97/barrel (+1.95% today); geopolitical risk RISING; Strait of Hormuz disruption risk = STRONG_BULLISH CL
DXY Collapse (-1.03% to 99.20): Despite hawkish Fed, dollar falling sharply — supporting EUR (ECB held at 2%, may hike) and commodity currencies
Real Yields Rising (DFII10 1.86%, up from ~1.70%): Primary headwind for gold and growth equities; gold fell -5.8% today post-FOMC
VIX at 24.06 (Risk-Off): Falling -4.11% today but still above 20 — balanced risk environment; credit spreads widening (HY OAS 3.20%)
